response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer with solid web, backend, and some low-latency systems experience, but the role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator architecture, deep-learning workload optimization, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear on the resume. While the Bachelor's + 8+ years of experience meets the formal educational bar, there is no evidence of hardware architecture, GPU/SIMD/MIMD work, or DNN training/inference optimization that this Principal-level IC role demands.
strengths: Meets the BS + 8+ years experience educational threshold
Has some low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (Dunnhumby microservices, DLang fibers/async I/O)
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, testing infrastructure
concerns: No SoC or IP modeling experience
No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, or deep-learning workload optimization background
Career trajectory is web/full-stack product engineering, not hardware-software co-design or system architecture

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / hardware architecture expertise
No SoC/IP modeling or HW-SW co-design experience
Some low-latency systems and DLang performance work
